name: SaaS Multi-Tenant
description: A Software-as-a-Service multi-tenant architecture where multiple customer organizations share infrastructure while maintaining strict data isolation. Tenant identity is established at the edge and propagated through all layers. The architecture must prevent cross-tenant data leakage, enforce per-tenant resource quotas, and support tenant-specific configurations while maintaining operational efficiency.

zones.name: tenants
zones.description: Individual tenant organizations and their users accessing the SaaS platform. Each tenant is mutually untrusted with respect to other tenants. Tenant identity must be verified before any data access is granted.

zones.name: edge
zones.description: The edge layer that resolves tenant identity from subdomain, header, or token, applies per-tenant rate limiting, and routes requests to the appropriate application instances. Handles TLS with tenant custom domains.

zones.name: application
zones.description: The shared application tier processing requests within tenant-scoped contexts. Every operation is executed with a tenant context that enforces isolation at the application layer. Shared services ensure tenant context propagation across all internal calls.

zones.name: tenant-data
zones.description: The tenant data layer where each tenant's data is logically or physically isolated. Implements row-level security, per-tenant encryption keys, and strict access controls to prevent cross-tenant data access.

zones.name: platform-management
zones.description: The platform operations layer used by the SaaS provider to manage tenants, billing, provisioning, and platform health. Has cross-tenant visibility for operational purposes with strict RBAC controls.

mermaid_template:
flowchart TB
    subgraph tenants["Tenants (Untrusted)"]
        t1_user[Tenant A User]
        t2_user[Tenant B User]
        t1_admin[Tenant A Admin]
        t2_api[Tenant B API Client]
    end
    subgraph edge_layer["Edge (Semi-Trusted)"]
        cdn(CDN / WAF)
        resolver(Tenant Resolver)
        limiter(Per-Tenant Rate Limiter)
    end
    subgraph app["Application (Trusted)"]
        ctx(Tenant Context Middleware)
        svc1(Service A)
        svc2(Service B)
        worker(Background Worker)
        cache[(Tenant-Prefixed Cache)]
    end
    subgraph tenant_data["Tenant Data (Highly Trusted)"]
        t1_db[(Tenant A Data)]
        t2_db[(Tenant B Data)]
        t1_files[(Tenant A Files)]
        t2_files[(Tenant B Files)]
    end
    subgraph platform["Platform Management (Highly Trusted)"]
        admin(Admin Console)
        billing(Billing System)
        provision(Tenant Provisioning)
        monitor(Platform Monitoring)
    end
    t1_user -->|HTTPS| cdn
    t2_user -->|HTTPS| cdn
    t1_admin -->|HTTPS| cdn
    t2_api -->|HTTPS| cdn
    cdn --> resolver
    resolver --> limiter
    limiter -->|Tenant JWT| ctx
    ctx --> svc1
    ctx --> svc2
    svc1 --> worker
    svc1 --> cache
    svc1 -->|RLS: Tenant A| t1_db
    svc1 -->|RLS: Tenant B| t2_db
    svc2 -->|Scoped| t1_files
    svc2 -->|Scoped| t2_files
    svc1 -.->|Admin RBAC| admin
    admin --> billing
    admin --> provision
    admin --> monitor
